questionTextSource: Why can it be dangerous if you, as the last in a queue, immediately overtake as soon as the oncoming traffic is past?
explanationSource: If a convoy has formed, drivers should basically overtake one after the other. The last of a convoy has the longest overtaking path and must also expect other vehicles starting to overtake in front of him.
answerASource: Because you must reckon with others in the queue swinging out to overtake
answerBSource: Because the distance needed to overtake might not be sufficient
answerCSource: Because if you perhaps need to push back into the queue, this could lead to an accident
questionTextTarget: Siz navbatning oxirida turib, qarama-qarshi transport o‘tib ketishi bilan darhol quvib o‘tish nega xavfli bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Agar kolonna hosil bo‘lgan bo‘lsa, haydovchilar odatda birin-ketin quvib o‘tishi kerak. Kolonnaning oxiridagi transport vositasi eng uzun quvib o‘tish yo‘liga ega bo‘ladi va uning oldidagi boshqa transport vositalari ham quvib o‘tishni boshlashi mumkinligini hisobga olishi kerak.
answerATarget: Chunki navbatdagi boshqalar ham quvib o‘tish uchun chetga chiqishini kutishingiz kerak
answerBTarget: Chunki quvib o‘tish uchun kerakli masofa yetarli bo‘lmasligi mumkin
answerCTarget: Chunki navbatga qayta kirishga majbur bo‘lsangiz, bu avariyaga olib kelishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What must you remember if you want to overtake?
explanationSource: In an overtaking maneuver you should make sure that the oncoming lane is free. Be sure that there are no bends or gates as well and you only overtake a car. Watch out for more road users, especially trucks.
answerASource: The van could start to overtake the vehicle travelling in front of it
answerBSource: Oncoming traffic could appear
answerCSource: As no oncoming traffic is in sight, you may overtake without hesitation
questionTextTarget: Quvib o‘tmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Quvib o‘tish manevrida qarama-qarshi yo‘lak bo‘sh ekaniga ishonch hosil qilishingiz kerak. Burilishlar yoki darvozalar yo‘qligiga ham ishonch hosil qiling va faqat bitta avtomobilni quvib o‘ting. Boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga, ayniqsa yuk mashinalariga e’tibor bering.
answerATarget: Furgon oldidagi transport vositasini quvib o‘tishni boshlashi mumkin
answerCTarget: Qarama-qarshi transport ko‘rinmayotgani uchun ikkilanmasdan quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin

questionTextSource: Are you allowed to overtake the black car on this autobahn on the right?
explanationSource: The black car may not be overtaken on the right in this example. On freeways and highways, you may only overtake on the right as an exception. This is the case, for example, when a vehicle queue has formed on the left.
answerASource: No, because there is no queue of vehicles in the left lane
answerBSource: Yes, if you do not drive faster than 80 km/h
answerCSource: Yes, because there is enough space to overtake
questionTextTarget: Bu avtomagistralda qora avtomobilni o‘ng tomondan quvib o‘tishingiz mumkinmi?
explanationTarget: Bu misolda qora avtomobilni o‘ng tomondan quvib o‘tish mumkin emas. Avtomagistral va tezkor yo‘llarda o‘ng tomondan quvib o‘tishga faqat istisno tariqasida ruxsat beriladi. Masalan, chap yo‘lakda transport navbati hosil bo‘lganda.
answerATarget: Yo‘q, chunki chap yo‘lakda transport navbati yo‘q
answerCTarget: Ha, chunki quvib o‘tish uchun yetarli joy bor

questionTextSource: Both cars are travelling at about 30 km/h. Are you allowed to overtake both before the bend?
explanationSource: You may go over the broken line. An overtaking process would still be too dangerous here, because the manageable distance to overtake before the turn is too short. You also have to expect that the driver of the light car will start to overtake.
answerASource: - the distance you need to overtake would be too great
answerBSource: - the light-coloured car could pull out to overtake
answerCSource: - you are not allowed to cross the broken line
questionTextTarget: Ikkala avtomobil taxminan 30 km/soat tezlikda ketyapti. Burilishdan oldin ikkalasini ham quvib o‘tishingiz mumkinmi?
explanationTarget: Uzilgan chiziqdan o‘tishingiz mumkin. Ammo bu yerda quvib o‘tish baribir juda xavfli bo‘ladi, chunki burilishgacha quvib o‘tish uchun ko‘rinadigan masofa juda qisqa. Shuningdek, och rangli avtomobil haydovchisi ham quvib o‘tishni boshlashini kutishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: - quvib o‘tish uchun kerakli masofa juda katta bo‘ladi
answerBTarget: - och rangli avtomobil quvib o‘tish uchun chiqishi mumkin
answerCTarget: - uzilgan chiziqdan o‘tishga ruxsat yo‘q

questionTextSource: The driver of the overtaking car has evidently made a miscalculation. What must you do?
explanationSource: The car driver should reduce the speed. Otherwise an accident could occur. If this is not enough, you could additionally fall back on the grass verge on the right.
answerASource: Brake immediately and veer to the right
answerBSource: Proceed as before
questionTextTarget: Quvib o‘tayotgan avtomobil haydovchisi aniq noto‘g‘ri hisob qilgan. Siz nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Haydovchi tezlikni kamaytirishi kerak. Aks holda avariya sodir bo‘lishi mumkin. Agar bu yetarli bo‘lmasa, qo‘shimcha ravishda o‘ng tomondagi maysazor chetiga chekinishingiz mumkin.

questionTextSource: You want to overtake. What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: As the vehicle behind you has already started the overtaking process, you should refrain from overtaking.
answerASource: I refrain from overtaking
answerBSource: I accelerate
answerCSource: I maintain my speed
questionTextTarget: Siz quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Ortingizdagi transport vositasi allaqachon quvib o‘tishni boshlaganligi sabab, siz quvib o‘tishdan voz kechishingiz kerak.
answerCTarget: Tezligimni saqlayman

questionTextSource: You want to overtake. What should you do?
explanationSource: Here you can overtake if you can see over the required distance and if there is no oncoming vehicle (limited visibility).
answerASource: - only if I have a clear view over the necessary stretch of road
answerBSource: - only if there is no oncoming vehicle
answerCSource: - at the same time, as the [blue car]
questionTextTarget: Siz quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu yerda kerakli yo‘l qismini aniq ko‘ra olsangiz va qarama-qarshi transport bo‘lmasa, quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin. Ko‘rinish cheklanganligini hisobga oling.
answerATarget: - faqat kerakli yo‘l qismini aniq ko‘ra olsam
answerCTarget: - [ko‘k avtomobil] bilan bir vaqtda

questionTextSource: Why are you not allowed to overtake here?
explanationSource: In general, you must not overtake if the entire overtaking distance is not visible or the side clearance to other road users cannot be met. Both negative factors are given in the present situation: The assessable track is too short for a safe overtaking maneuver. The minimum distance to the cyclists of 1.5 m cannot be met with oncoming traffic.
answerASource: Because the visible stretch is not sufficient
answerBSource: Because I would not be able to maintain an adequate distance to the side in the event of oncoming traffic
answerCSource: Because I am not permitted to cross the central line
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Umuman olganda, butun quvib o‘tish masofasi ko‘rinmasa yoki boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarigacha yon masofani saqlab bo‘lmasa, quvib o‘tish mumkin emas. Bu vaziyatda ikkala salbiy omil ham mavjud: xavfsiz quvib o‘tish uchun ko‘rinadigan masofa juda qisqa. Qarama-qarshi transport bo‘lsa, velosipedchilargacha 1,5 m minimal masofani saqlab bo‘lmaydi.
answerBTarget: Chunki qarama-qarshi transport bo‘lsa, yetarli yon masofani saqlay olmayman
answerCTarget: Chunki markaziy chiziqdan o‘tishga ruxsat yo‘q

questionTextSource: You are being overtaken and the oncoming traffic is getting dangerously close. Despite this the other vehicle continues with the overtaking manoeuvre. What should you do?
explanationSource: You have to slow down and drive to the right, so that the overtaking vehicle driver can go back into lane on time. In no case should you increase the speed if you are overtaken.
answerASource: - reduce my speed
answerBSource: - maintain my speed
answerCSource: - increase my speed
questionTextTarget: Sizni quvib o‘tishmoqda va qarama-qarshi transport xavfli darajada yaqinlashmoqda. Shunga qaramay boshqa transport vositasi quvib o‘tishni davom ettirmoqda. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Quvib o‘tayotgan haydovchi o‘z vaqtida yo‘lagiga qayta olishi uchun siz tezlikni kamaytirib, o‘ngga yaqin yurishingiz kerak. Sizni quvib o‘tishayotganida hech qanday holatda tezlikni oshirmang.
answerCTarget: - tezligimni oshiraman

questionTextSource: Why should you brake hard now?
explanationSource: Since the blue passenger car will most likely get on your lane, you have to slow down immediately and keep to the right.
answerASource: Because of the car
answerBSource: Because of the truck
answerCSource: Because of the tractor
questionTextTarget: Nega hozir qattiq tormoz berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Ko‘k yengil avtomobil ehtimol sizning yo‘lagizga chiqadi. Shuning uchun darhol tezlikni kamaytirib, o‘ng tomonni saqlashingiz kerak.
answerCTarget: Traktor sabab

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: As the car driver, you do not have to dodge to the middle lane when another car pushes you from behind or uses the flash light. You should overtake the blue car and the red van as usual. To change safely to the middle lane, the overtaking process must be completed. Only then you can change.
answerASource: I overtake [the blue car] and then move into the middle lane
answerBSource: I overtake [the red van] and then move into the middle lane
answerCSource: I brake slightly to prompt the vehicle behind to keep its distance
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Haydovchi sifatida orqadan boshqa avtomobil siqsa yoki chiroq bilan ishora qilsa, o‘rta yo‘lakka chetlashingiz shart emas. Siz ko‘k avtomobil va qizil furgonni odatdagidek quvib o‘tishingiz kerak. O‘rta yo‘lakka xavfsiz o‘tish uchun quvib o‘tish jarayoni yakunlangan bo‘lishi kerak. Faqat shundan keyin yo‘lakni almashtirishingiz mumkin.
answerATarget: [Ko‘k avtomobil]ni quvib o‘tib, keyin o‘rta yo‘lakka o‘taman
answerBTarget: [Qizil furgon]ni quvib o‘tib, keyin o‘rta yo‘lakka o‘taman
answerCTarget: Orqadagi transport masofa saqlashi uchun yengil tormoz beraman

questionTextSource: You want to overtake. What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: You already indicated and want to overtake the truck. In the rearview mirror you can see a red car approaching on the left lane at high speed. You need to stop the overtaking process immediately and stay behind the truck. If you continue, you force the red car to brake suddenly. He could drive against your car.
answerASource: I cease the overtaking manoeuvre and remain behind the truck
answerBSource: I accelerate and quickly continue the overtaking manoeuvre
answerCSource: I maintain my speed and continue the overtaking manoeuvre
questionTextTarget: Siz quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Siz allaqachon signal berib, yuk mashinasini quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Orqa ko‘zguda chap yo‘lakda yuqori tezlikda yaqinlashayotgan qizil avtomobilni ko‘ryapsiz. Quvib o‘tish jarayonini darhol to‘xtatib, yuk mashinasi ortida qolishingiz kerak. Davom etsangiz, qizil avtomobilni keskin tormozlashga majbur qilasiz. U sizning avtomobilingizga urilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Quvib o‘tish manevrini to‘xtatib, yuk mashinasi ortida qolaman
answerBTarget: Tezlashib, quvib o‘tish manevrini tez davom ettiraman
answerCTarget: Tezligimni saqlab, quvib o‘tishni davom ettiraman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: While overtaking a truck, you observe a fast approaching car in the rearview mirror. It is too late to complete the overtaking process. Accelerate and complete the overtaking process quickly but safely. Basically, subsequent vehicles do not have priority; even not on the freeway.
answerASource: I quickly continue the overtaking manoeuvre
answerBSource: I cease the overtaking manoeuvre, and pull back into the right-hand lane
answerCSource: I brake, but continue the overtaking manoeuvre
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Yuk mashinasini quvib o‘tayotganda orqa ko‘zguda tez yaqinlashayotgan avtomobilni ko‘ryapsiz. Quvib o‘tish jarayonini yakunlash uchun juda kech. Tezlashib, quvib o‘tish manevrini tez, lekin xavfsiz yakunlang. Asosan, ortdan kelayotgan transport vositalari ustunlikka ega emas, hatto avtomagistralda ham.
answerATarget: Quvib o‘tish manevrini tez davom ettiraman
answerBTarget: Quvib o‘tish manevrini to‘xtatib, o‘ng yo‘lakka qaytaman
answerCTarget: Tormoz beraman, lekin quvib o‘tishni davom ettiraman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: A driver drives dangerously close to you on the left-hand lane and signals his/her overtaking intent with his flash light. You should still overtake the transporter on the mid-lane and then get back into the lane in front of it to defuse the situation.
answerASource: I overtake the van and then move into the middle lane
answerBSource: I move immediately into the lane to the right
answerCSource: I brake slightly to prompt the vehicle behind to keep its distance
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Chap yo‘lakda bir haydovchi sizga xavfli darajada yaqin kelmoqda va chiroq bilan quvib o‘tish niyatini bildirayotir. Shunga qaramay, siz o‘rta yo‘lakdagi transporterni quvib o‘tib, vaziyatni yumshatish uchun keyin uning oldidagi yo‘lakka qaytishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Furgonni quvib o‘tib, keyin o‘rta yo‘lakka o‘taman
answerCTarget: Orqadagi transport masofa saqlashi uchun yengil tormoz beraman

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: As a vehicle is approaching from the front and want to overtake a car behind you (red), you should slow down and extremely drive far right.
answerASource: I slow down
answerBSource: I drive as far to the right-side as possible
answerCSource: I accelerate
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Old tomondan transport vositasi yaqinlashmoqda va u sizning ortingizdagi qizil avtomobilni quvib o‘tmoqchi. Shuning uchun tezlikni kamaytirib, imkon qadar juda o‘ng tomonda yurishingiz kerak.
answerCTarget: Tezlashaman

questionTextSource: Why must you slow down here?
explanationSource: The oncoming car overtakes despite opposing traffic about 250 m in front of you. You have to reduce your speed and drive to the far right. So, you defuse the situation and give the overtaking car more time and space to complete the overtaking process. The tractor moves away from the intersection and poses no danger.
answerASource: Because of the overtaking car
answerBSource: Because the maximum permitted speed is 80 km/h
answerCSource: Because of the tractor
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda tezlikni kamaytirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qarshidan kelayotgan avtomobil sizdan taxminan 250 m oldinda qarama-qarshi transport bo‘lsa ham quvib o‘tmoqda. Tezlikni kamaytirib, eng o‘ng tomonda yurishingiz kerak. Shunday qilib vaziyatni yumshatasiz va quvib o‘tayotgan avtomobilga quvib o‘tishni yakunlash uchun ko‘proq vaqt va joy berasiz. Traktor kesishmadan uzoqlashmoqda va xavf tug‘dirmaydi.
answerBTarget: Ruxsat etilgan maksimal tezlik 80 km/soat bo‘lgani sabab
answerCTarget: Traktor sabab

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: If a car overtakes you despite oncoming traffic, you should delay and try to drive to the right as far as possible. This gives the other vehicle enough space to safely complete the overtaking process.
answerASource: I slow down
answerBSource: I drive as far to the right-side as possible
answerCSource: I accelerate
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar avtomobil qarama-qarshi transport bo‘lsa ham sizni quvib o‘tayotgan bo‘lsa, tezlikni kamaytirib, iloji boricha o‘ng tomonda yurishga harakat qiling. Bu boshqa transport vositasiga quvib o‘tishni xavfsiz yakunlash uchun yetarli joy beradi.
answerCTarget: Tezlashaman

questionTextSource: Why are you not allowed to overtake in this situation?
explanationSource: You are not allowed to overtake because of the motorbike coming at a fast speed behind you that will overtake you. Also the distance required to overtake is too long in this situation
answerASource: Because the motorbike wants to overtake me
answerBSource: Because my overtaking distance is too long
answerCSource: Because this is a no-overtaking zone
questionTextTarget: Nega bu vaziyatda quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Ortingizdan yuqori tezlikda kelayotgan mototsikl sizni quvib o‘tmoqchi bo‘lgani sabab quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas. Bundan tashqari, bu vaziyatda quvib o‘tish uchun kerakli masofa juda uzun.
answerBTarget: Chunki quvib o‘tish masofam juda uzun
answerCTarget: Chunki bu quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan hudud

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: Given the truck that is overtaking you has incoming traffic, you should slow down and drive as far to the right as possible to allow him to overtake you
answerASource: I slow down
answerBSource: I drive as far to the right-side as possible
answerCSource: I stop
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Sizni quvib o‘tayotgan yuk mashinasi qarama-qarshi transportga duch kelmoqda. U quvib o‘tishni yakunlay olishi uchun siz tezlikni kamaytirib, imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda yurishingiz kerak.
answerCTarget: To‘xtayman

questionTextSource: You want to overtake. What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: You should not overtake the truck, as you cannot see the distance required for this.
answerASource: I refrain from overtaking the truck, because I do not have a clear view over the necessary stretch of road
answerBSource: I follow the motorbike, because the truck is using its indicators to signal an opportunity to overtake
answerCSource: I reduce my distance to the truck, to enable me to overtake more quickly
questionTextTarget: Siz quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Yuk mashinasini quvib o‘tmasligingiz kerak, chunki buning uchun kerakli masofani ko‘ra olmayapsiz.
answerATarget: Kerakli yo‘l qismini aniq ko‘ra olmaganim uchun yuk mashinasini quvib o‘tmayman
answerBTarget: Yuk mashinasi burilish ko‘rsatkichlari bilan quvib o‘tish imkonini bildirayotgani uchun mototsikl ortidan boraman
answerCTarget: Tezroq quvib o‘tish uchun yuk mashinasigacha masofani kamaytiraman

questionTextSource: Why must you abort your overtaking manoeuvre?
explanationSource: You should abort the overtaking maneuver because the tractor wants to turn left and because oncoming traffic may be obstructed.
answerASource: Because the tractor wants to turn left
answerBSource: Because it could obstruct oncoming traffic
answerCSource: Because a no-overtaking zone is visible ahead
questionTextTarget: Nega quvib o‘tish manevrini bekor qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Traktor chapga burilmoqchi bo‘lgani va qarama-qarshi transportga xalaqit berilishi mumkinligi sabab quvib o‘tish manevrini bekor qilishingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: Chunki bu qarama-qarshi transportga xalaqit berishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Chunki oldinda quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan hudud ko‘rinmoqda

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: You should not overtake because the tractor will swerve to the left (see indicator).
answerASource: - do not overtake, because the tractor wants to pull out to the left
answerBSource: - overtake carefully, because the tractor is demanding I do so
answerCSource: - overtake immediately, because the overtaking distance is large enough
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Traktor chapga chiqishini ko‘rsatkich bilan bildirayotgani sabab uni quvib o‘tmasligingiz kerak.
answerATarget: - quvib o‘tmayman, chunki traktor chapga chiqmoqchi
answerBTarget: - ehtiyotkorlik bilan quvib o‘taman, chunki traktor shuni talab qilmoqda
answerCTarget: - darhol quvib o‘taman, chunki quvib o‘tish masofasi yetarli

questionTextSource: You want to overtake. What is the right course of action here?
explanationSource: The correct behavior (proactive) here is not to overtake as the yellow vehicle could overtake and oncoming traffic could appear (restricted view).
answerASource: I do not overtake, because the [yellow] vehicle might want to overtake
answerBSource: I do not overtake, because oncoming traffic could emerge
answerCSource: I overtake, because no oncoming traffic is visible
questionTextTarget: Siz quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Bu yerda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Bu yerda oldindan ko‘ra bilib to‘g‘ri harakat — quvib o‘tmaslik, chunki sariq transport vositasi quvib o‘tishi mumkin va qarama-qarshi transport paydo bo‘lishi mumkin. Ko‘rinish cheklangan.
answerATarget: [Sariq] transport vositasi quvib o‘tmoqchi bo‘lishi mumkinligi sabab quvib o‘tmayman
answerBTarget: Qarama-qarshi transport paydo bo‘lishi mumkinligi sabab quvib o‘tmayman
answerCTarget: Qarama-qarshi transport ko‘rinmagani uchun quvib o‘taman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: As a vehicle is in your lane, you should slow down immediately and as far as possible turn right to avoid a collision.
answerASource: I brake immediately
answerBSource: I drive as far to the right as possible
answerCSource: I continue driving as before
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Sizning yo‘lagizda transport vositasi bo‘lgani uchun, to‘qnashuvning oldini olish maqsadida darhol sekinlashib, imkon qadar o‘ngga burilishingiz kerak.
answerCTarget: Oldingidek davom etaman

questionTextSource: Why are you not allowed to overtake now?
explanationSource: Because of the motorcycle (oncoming traffic) and the course of the road and the resulting poor visibility, you are not allowed to overtake the cyclist.
answerASource: - motorbike
answerBSource: - layout of the road
answerCSource: - [red] car
questionTextTarget: Nega hozir quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Mototsikl, ya’ni qarama-qarshi transport, hamda yo‘lning yo‘nalishi va bundan kelib chiqadigan yomon ko‘rinish sabab velosipedchini quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas.
answerCTarget: - [qizil] avtomobil

questionTextSource: Why are you not allowed to overtake here now?
explanationSource: At this moment, a motorcyclist passes the tractor. Wait until you can safely begin the overtaking manoeuvre.
answerASource: - motorbike
answerBSource: - [red car]
answerCSource: - signposted prohibition on overtaking
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda hozir quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Ayni paytda mototsiklchi traktorni quvib o‘tmoqda. Quvib o‘tish manevrini xavfsiz boshlashingiz mumkin bo‘lguncha kuting.
answerCTarget: - belgi bilan ko‘rsatilgan quvib o‘tish taqiqi

questionTextSource: Why are you not allowed to overtake here?
explanationSource: Due to the curve and the trees, you cannot see the rest of the road sufficiently. Out of town, you must keep a minimum distance of 2 metres to the side of cyclists. In the event of sudden oncoming traffic, you would not be able to maintain this distance when overtaking. Therefore, you must not overtake here.
answerASource: - do not have an adequate view of the road ahead
answerBSource: - cannot maintain an adequate passing distance from the cyclists if there is any oncoming traffic
answerCSource: - may not cross over the central lane markings
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Burilish va daraxtlar sabab oldingi yo‘l qismini yetarlicha ko‘ra olmaysiz. Shahar tashqarisida velosipedchilardan kamida 2 metr yon masofa saqlashingiz kerak. To‘satdan qarama-qarshi transport paydo bo‘lsa, quvib o‘tishda bu masofani saqlay olmaysiz. Shuning uchun bu yerda quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas.
answerBTarget: - qarama-qarshi transport bo‘lsa, velosipedchilardan yetarli o‘tish masofasini saqlay olmayman
answerCTarget: - markaziy yo‘lak chiziqlarini kesib o‘tishim mumkin emas

questionTextSource: Why are you not allowed to overtake here?
explanationSource: The road is too small to allow enough side distance to cyclists and oncoming traffic at the same time.
answerASource: Because the side clearance to the cyclists is too small
answerBSource: Because I may endanger oncoming traffic
answerCSource: Because I may not cross the centre line
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l velosipedchilar va qarama-qarshi transport orasida bir vaqtning o‘zida yetarli yon masofa qoldirish uchun juda tor.
answerATarget: Chunki velosipedchilargacha yon masofa juda kichik
answerBTarget: Chunki qarama-qarshi transportga xavf tug‘dirishim mumkin
answerCTarget: Chunki markaziy chiziqdan o‘tishim mumkin emas

questionTextSource: You want to overtake on a tree-lined avenue. What special aspect should you bear in mind?
explanationSource: The avenue is framed by trees. Therefore, the change of light and shadow often leads to the incorrect estimation of distances. Likewise, it can often lead to trees falling and vehicles with high bodies trying to avoid branches.
answerASource: Side clearances are frequently misjudged in this situation
answerBSource: Vehicles with high superstructures frequently perform evasive manoeuvres to avoid branches in this situation
answerCSource: Accidents involving trees are particularly frequent here
questionTextTarget: Siz daraxtzor xiyobonli yo‘lda quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Qaysi alohida jihatni yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Xiyobon daraxtlar bilan o‘ralgan. Shuning uchun yorug‘lik va soyaning almashishi masofalarni noto‘g‘ri baholashga olib keladi. Shuningdek, daraxtlar qulashi va baland ustki tuzilishga ega transport vositalari shoxlardan qochishga harakat qilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Bunday vaziyatda yon masofalar ko‘pincha noto‘g‘ri baholanadi
answerBTarget: Baland ustki tuzilishga ega transport vositalari ko‘pincha shoxlardan qochish uchun chetlashadi
answerCTarget: Bu yerda daraxtlar bilan bog‘liq avariyalar ayniqsa ko‘p uchraydi

questionTextSource: Why must you discontinue your overtaking manoeuvre here?
explanationSource: The tractor starts to turn left. The tractor drives across the left lane of the road. If you overtake now, you would collide with the tractor.
answerASource: Because the tractor will turn off to the left
answerBSource: Because the motorbike will overtake me
answerCSource: Because I can see a no-overtaking sign
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda quvib o‘tish manevrini to‘xtatishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Traktor chapga burila boshlaydi. Traktor yo‘lning chap yo‘lagi orqali harakatlanadi. Hozir quvib o‘tsangiz, traktor bilan to‘qnashasiz.
answerCTarget: Chunki quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan belgini ko‘ryapman

questionTextSource: You are driving on a road with one lane for each direction. A convoy of motor vehicles is driving up ahead of you. Why should you refrain from overtaking in order to prevent a dangerous situation from occurring?
explanationSource:
A group of pedestrians, cyclists or motor vehicles, which is traveling together in road traffic, is called a closed association. Closed associations must be clearly marked and must not be interrupted.
Because a closed association consists of several vehicles, you cannot really understand the traffic situation. When overtaking a closed bandage, you should avoid premature inserting, which makes the overtaking path significantly longer.
answerASource: Because the overtaking distance is considerably larger than with single vehicles
answerBSource: Because I should not break the convoy by pulling back into my lane early
answerCSource: Because I cannot assess the road traffic situation ahead of the convoy
questionTextTarget: Siz har bir yo‘nalishda bittadan yo‘lakli yo‘lda ketyapsiz. Oldingizda motorli transport vositalari kolonnasi ketmoqda. Xavfli vaziyatning oldini olish uchun nega quvib o‘tishdan voz kechishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l harakatida birgalikda harakatlanayotgan piyodalar, velosipedchilar yoki motorli transport vositalari guruhi yopiq kolonna deyiladi. Yopiq kolonnalar aniq belgilangan bo‘lishi va bo‘linmasligi kerak. Kolonna bir nechta transport vositasidan iborat bo‘lgani uchun oldindagi harakat vaziyatini to‘liq baholay olmaysiz. Yopiq kolonnani quvib o‘tayotganda erta qayta kirishdan saqlanish kerak, bu quvib o‘tish yo‘lini ancha uzaytiradi.
answerATarget: Chunki quvib o‘tish masofasi yakka transport vositalariga qaraganda ancha uzun
answerBTarget: Chunki yo‘lagimga erta qaytib, kolonnani bo‘lmasligim kerak
answerCTarget: Chunki kolonna oldidagi yo‘l harakati vaziyatini baholay olmayman

questionTextSource: Why is it dangerous to overtake in this situation?
explanationSource:
You are driving in a convoy of several cars behind a lorry on a winding road with oncoming traffic. Ideally, the car behind the lorry overtakes first before the vehicles behind move up and start to overtake. 
On the left-hand bend, you cannot see the overtaking lane sufficiently. You will probably have to cancel the overtaking manoeuvre and pull in between two vehicles. There is a possibility that the distance between the vehicles in front is too small and that you will endanger yourself and other road users by pulling in.
answerASource: Because vehicles ahead may swerve out
answerBSource: Because I cannot see far enough along the route necessary for overtaking
answerCSource: Because there is not sufficient space to pull back in between the vehicles ahead
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda quvib o‘tish nega xavfli?
explanationTarget: Siz qarama-qarshi transport bo‘lgan egri yo‘lda yuk mashinasi ortidan bir nechta avtomobillar kolonnasida ketyapsiz. Ideal holatda avval yuk mashinasi ortidagi avtomobil quvib o‘tadi, keyin orqadagi transport vositalari yaqinlashib, quvib o‘tishni boshlaydi. Chap burilishda quvib o‘tish yo‘lagini yetarlicha ko‘ra olmaysiz. Ehtimol quvib o‘tishni bekor qilib, ikkita transport vositasi orasiga kirishingizga to‘g‘ri keladi. Oldindagi transportlar orasidagi masofa juda kichik bo‘lishi va qayta kirishda o‘zingizga ham, boshqalarga ham xavf tug‘dirishingiz mumkin.
answerATarget: Chunki oldindagi transport vositalari chetga chiqishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Chunki quvib o‘tish uchun zarur yo‘l qismini yetarlicha ko‘ra olmayman
answerCTarget: Chunki oldindagi transport vositalari orasiga qayta kirish uchun yetarli joy yo‘q

questionTextSource: Why are you not permitted to overtake in this situation?
explanationSource:
You are not allowed to overtake in this situation because the tractor is travelling too fast for you to overtake it at your maximum speed of 50 km/h.
The motorbike is also approaching at high speed. It will probably overtake you as there is a long straight ahead and no oncoming traffic in sight.
answerASource: Because the motorbike might overtake me
answerBSource: Because I do not have enough speed
answerCSource: Because overtaking is prohibited here
questionTextTarget: Nega bu vaziyatda quvib o‘tishga ruxsat yo‘q?
explanationTarget: Bu vaziyatda quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas, chunki traktor sizning maksimal 50 km/soat tezligingizda uni quvib o‘tish uchun juda tez harakatlanmoqda. Mototsikl ham yuqori tezlikda yaqinlashmoqda. Oldinda uzun to‘g‘ri yo‘l bor va qarama-qarshi transport ko‘rinmayotgani uchun u ehtimol sizni quvib o‘tadi.
answerATarget: Chunki mototsikl meni quvib o‘tishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Chunki bu yerda quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan

questionTextSource: The vehicles ahead of you are driving at about 30 km/h. Why are you not permitted to overtake before the road bend?
explanationSource: You are not allowed to overtake before the bend as your overtaking distance is too long to overtake both vehicles before the bend. There is also not enough distance between the two cars for you to pull in. In addition, the red car has the right of way to overtake in front of you; if you both start the overtaking manoeuvre, there is a danger for you and oncoming traffic. As the bend is not visible, you cannot know whether oncoming traffic is coming.
answerASource: Because my overtaking distance is too long
answerBSource: Because the [red] car might pull out to overtake
answerCSource: Because I am not permitted to cross the lane marking
questionTextTarget: Oldingizdagi transport vositalari taxminan 30 km/soat tezlikda ketyapti. Nega burilishdan oldin quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Burilishdan oldin quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas, chunki ikkala transport vositasini ham burilishgacha quvib o‘tish uchun quvib o‘tish masofangiz juda uzun. Ikki avtomobil orasida qayta kirish uchun yetarli masofa ham yo‘q. Bundan tashqari, qizil avtomobil sizdan oldin quvib o‘tish ustunligiga ega; agar ikkalangiz ham quvib o‘tishni boshlasangiz, siz va qarama-qarshi transport uchun xavf tug‘iladi. Burilish ko‘rinmagani uchun qarama-qarshi transport kelayotgan-kelmayotganini bila olmaysiz.
answerATarget: Chunki quvib o‘tish masofam juda uzun
answerBTarget: Chunki [qizil] avtomobil quvib o‘tish uchun chiqishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Chunki yo‘lak chizig‘ini kesib o‘tishga ruxsat yo‘q

questionTextSource: Why do you have to switch to the right-hand lane?
explanationSource:
The traffic sign indicates a narrowing (end of a lane) in 200 metres. 
The lane is led into oncoming traffic through the narrowing, so you must be extra vigilant not to end up in oncoming traffic.
answerASource: - [red] car
answerBSource: - [blue] car
answerCSource: - [yellow tractor]
questionTextTarget: Nega o‘ng yo‘lakka o‘tishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l belgisi 200 metr oldinda torayish, ya’ni yo‘lak tugashini bildiradi. Yo‘lak torayish orqali qarama-qarshi transportga yo‘naltiriladi, shuning uchun qarama-qarshi harakatga tushib qolmaslik uchun ayniqsa hushyor bo‘lishingiz kerak.
answerCTarget: - [sariq traktor]

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action here?
explanationSource: You should not overtake for the time being, as you are driving side by side and you can't keep enough lateral distance.
answerASource: I do not overtake the [cyclists] for now
answerBSource: I overtake the [cyclists]
answerCSource: I sound my horn to prompt the [cyclists] to ride one behind the other
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Hozircha quvib o‘tmasligingiz kerak, chunki velosipedchilar yonma-yon ketmoqda va siz yetarli yon masofani saqlay olmaysiz.
answerCTarget: [Velosipedchilar] bir-birining ortidan yurishi uchun signal chalaman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: In such a situation, you must slow down to walking speed and keep to the right as much as possible. You should not drive past the pedestrians because the danger is too high.
answerASource: I slow down to walking speed
answerBSource: I drive over to the right-side as far as possible
answerCSource: I drive on past the pedestrian
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Bunday vaziyatda piyoda tezligigacha sekinlashishingiz va iloji boricha o‘ng tomonda yurishingiz kerak. Piyodalar yonidan o‘tib ketmasligingiz kerak, chunki xavf juda yuqori.
answerCTarget: Piyoda yonidan o‘tib ketaman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: You have to reduce your speed because the side distance to the cyclist cannot be kept.

answerBSource: I maintain my speed
answerCSource: I overtake [the cyclist]
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Velosipedchigacha yon masofani saqlab bo‘lmagani uchun tezlikni kamaytirishingiz kerak.
answerCTarget: [Velosipedchi]ni quvib o‘taman

questionTextSource: Why should you not overtake the moped rider in this situation?
explanationSource:
In the roadworks area, the speed limit is 30 km/h and the road is narrowed. 
You are therefore not allowed to drive as fast as would be necessary to overtake the moped rider safely. 
Due to the narrowness of the road, you cannot keep the required distance to the side and the poor condition of the road could cause the moped rider to fall if you overtake him.
answerASource: Because this might cause the moped rider to fall
answerBSource: Because I am not allowed to drive significantly faster than the moped rider
answerCSource: Because I am unable to maintain the requisite amount of side clearance
questionTextTarget: Nega bu vaziyatda moped haydovchisini quvib o‘tmasligingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l ishlari hududida tezlik 30 km/soat bilan cheklangan va yo‘l toraygan. Shuning uchun moped haydovchisini xavfsiz quvib o‘tish uchun zarur bo‘lgan tezlikda yurishingiz mumkin emas. Yo‘lning torligi sabab zarur yon masofani saqlay olmaysiz, yo‘lning yomon holati esa quvib o‘tsangiz moped haydovchisining yiqilishiga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Chunki bu moped haydovchisining yiqilishiga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Chunki men moped haydovchisidan ancha tez yura olmayman
answerCTarget: Chunki zarur yon masofani saqlay olmayman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action here?
explanationSource: You cannot overtake the cyclist here because you cannot keep a sufficient distance to the side.
answerASource: I do not overtake [the cyclist] for now
answerBSource: I overtake [the cyclist]
answerCSource: I sound my horn to urge [the cyclist] to keep right
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Bu yerda velosipedchini quvib o‘ta olmaysiz, chunki yetarli yon masofani saqlay olmaysiz.
answerCTarget: [Velosipedchi] o‘ng tomonda yursin deb signal chalaman

questionTextSource: What must you reckon with on this autobahn car park?
explanationSource: The surface of this freeway parking lot consists of cobblestones that are not only uneven but also wet. Be prepared for the fact that the braking distance of your vehicle is extended by the lower traction. You do not have to expect oncoming vehicles. Careless pedestrians, however, can unexpectedly step onto the road at any time.
answerASource: People suddenly stepping onto the roadway
answerBSource: Danger of skidding when you brake
answerCSource: Oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Bu avtomagistral parkovkasida nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu avtomagistral parkovkasining yuzasi notekis va ho‘l tosh qoplamadan iborat. Ilashish pastligi sabab avtomobilingizning tormoz yo‘li uzayishini kuting. Qarama-qarshi transportni kutishingiz shart emas. Ammo ehtiyotsiz piyodalar istalgan paytda kutilmaganda yo‘lga chiqishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: Qarama-qarshi transport

questionTextSource: What do you do if you want to drive straight on?
explanationSource: You behave correctly if you reduce the speed of your vehicle and allow the preceding vehicle to change lane. The left lane may only be used for the purpose of turning left. Since you want to drive straight in the example, you must not use the left lane.
answerASource: Brake so that the driver in front can change lanes
answerBSource: 'Overtake the other vehicle in the left-hand lane since the traffic light is "green"'
answerCSource: Sound your horn to indicate to the driver in front that he may not change lanes so close to the crossroads
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri yurmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Transport vositangiz tezligini kamaytirib, oldindagi transport vositasiga yo‘lakni almashtirish imkonini bersangiz, to‘g‘ri harakat qilgan bo‘lasiz. Chap yo‘lak faqat chapga burilish uchun ishlatilishi mumkin. Misolda siz to‘g‘ri yurmoqchi bo‘lganingiz uchun chap yo‘lakdan foydalanmasligingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Oldindagi haydovchi yo‘lakni almashtira olishi uchun tormoz beraman
answerBTarget: Svetofor “yashil” bo‘lgani uchun boshqa transport vositasini chap yo‘lakda quvib o‘taman
answerCTarget: Oldindagi haydovchiga chorrahaga yaqin joyda yo‘lak almashtira olmasligini bildirish uchun signal chalaman

questionTextSource: You are approaching the vehicles in this picture. What do you do?
explanationSource: Outside of built-up areas, slow vehicles such as tractors, trucks and mopeds often ride on the hard shoulder and can thus be overtaken more easily. If such a vehicle wants to turn left, or if it has to return to the main road for other reasons, you have to allow the driver to change his/her lane.
answerASource: Watch if the truck and trailer remain on the hard shoulder
answerBSource: Allow the truck and trailer to enter the roadway when it indicates left
answerCSource: When the truck and trailer are indicating left, flash your headlights and proceed at a brisk pace
questionTextTarget: Rasmdagi transport vositalariga yaqinlashyapsiz. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida traktorlar, yuk mashinalari va mopedlar kabi sekin transport vositalari ko‘pincha yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida yuradi va shu orqali ularni osonroq quvib o‘tish mumkin. Agar bunday transport vositasi chapga burilmoqchi bo‘lsa yoki boshqa sabab bilan asosiy yo‘lga qaytishi kerak bo‘lsa, haydovchiga yo‘lakni almashtirishga imkon berishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Yuk mashinasi va tirkama yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida qoladimi-yo‘qmi kuzataman
answerBTarget: Yuk mashinasi va tirkama chapga signal berganda qatnov qismiga kirishiga imkon beraman
answerCTarget: Yuk mashinasi va tirkama chapga signal berganda chiroqlarimni chaqnatib, tez yurib o‘taman

questionTextSource: What should you anticipate in this situation?
explanationSource: The sign at the beginning of the video indicates "Beware of rolling gravel", so you must be aware that there is rolling gravel on the road and the yellow vehicle could miss you because the tractor in front of you obscures the view for the yellow car and for you.
answerASource: That the driver of the [yellow car] fails to see me
answerBSource: That there are loose chippings on the carriageway
answerCSource: That the vehicle ahead will turn right
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Video boshidagi belgi “sochilma shag‘aldan ehtiyot bo‘ling” degan ma’noni bildiradi. Shuning uchun yo‘lda sochilma shag‘al borligini va oldingizdagi traktor sariq avtomobil hamda siz uchun ko‘rinishni to‘sayotgani sabab sariq transport vositasi sizni payqamay qolishi mumkinligini hisobga olishingiz kerak.
answerCTarget: Oldindagi transport vositasi o‘ngga burilishiga

questionTextSource: [The white car] wants to turn left. What is the right course of action if [the car] fails to stop?
explanationSource: The white car wants to turn left and since you do not know whether it will stop (you have the right of way), it is better to give up your right of way and reduce your speed.
answerASource: I reduce my speed
answerBSource: I waive my right of way
answerCSource: I sound my horn and continue driving as before
questionTextTarget: [Oq avtomobil] chapga burilmoqchi. Agar [avtomobil] to‘xtamasa, to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Oq avtomobil chapga burilmoqchi. U to‘xtaydimi-yo‘qmi aniq bilmaganingiz uchun, siz ustunlikka ega bo‘lsangiz ham, ustunlik huquqingizdan voz kechib, tezlikni kamaytirganingiz ma’qul.
answerCTarget: Signal chalib, oldingidek davom etaman

questionTextSource: Why must you brake now?
explanationSource: You should brake because of the green vehicle, as it appears to be driving onto the road behind the tractor.
answerASource: - [green vehicle]

answerCSource: - [yellow car]

questionTextSource: What must you anticipate in this parking area?
explanationSource: Vehicles can leave the parking space, watch out for vehicles leaving the parking space. People can walk on the roadway because you are taking a break. Truck drivers often park in car parking spaces.

answerCSource: People on the roadway

Siz tanaffus joyida bo‘lganingiz uchun odamlar yo‘lda yurishi mumkin. Yuk mashinasi haydovchilari ko‘pincha yengil avtomobillar uchun parkovka joylariga noto‘g‘ri parkovka qiladi.
answerCTarget: Yo‘lda odamlarni

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: The car will probably overtake the cyclist. To be on the safe side, slow down and ride as far to the right as possible.
answerASource: I drive as far to the right as possible
answerBSource: I brake
answerCSource: I change direction to the left

explanationTarget: Avtomobil ehtimol velosipedchini quvib o‘tadi. Xavfsizlik uchun tezlikni kamaytiring va imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda yuring.
answerCTarget: Chapga yo‘nalishni o‘zgartiraman

questionTextSource: Why should you be ready to brake in this situation?
explanationSource: The tractor driver could drive into your lane at any moment, so be ready to brake to defuse the situation in time.

questionTextSource: What must be observed when several motorcycles are travelling together in a group?
explanationSource: Drive in a staggered manner to avoid rear-end collisions caused by sudden braking. Group rides are not easy; if one driver makes a mistake, all the others have to react.

answerBSource: The driving style of the group should be based on that of the least experienced motorcyclist

questionTextSource: What should you anticipate in this situation?

explanationTarget: Burilayotgan yuk mashinasi sabab furgon sizni ko‘rmay qolishi mumkin. Tormozga tayyor turing.

questionTextSource: Why should you further reduce your speed here?
explanationSource: It's unlikely that the car in the left lane will continue as it appears to have broken down. Even if it did, it wouldn't affect you. However, since there is a person in the lane, extra caution is required here. It's also possible that other people get out of the vehicle and run onto the road. The stationary car may be hidden by the bush or no warning triangle was set up. The following car could therefore recognize too late that the vehicle has stopped in front of it. You should therefore drive with foresight and expect the car behind to swerve into your lane.
answerASource: Because the [red] car could cross onto my lane
answerBSource: Because other people may walk onto the road
answerCSource: Because [the blue car] could continue moving
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda tezligingizni yanada kamaytirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Chap yo‘lakdagi avtomobil buzilib qolgandek ko‘ringani uchun uning davom etishi ehtimoldan yiroq. Davom etsa ham, sizga ta’sir qilmaydi. Ammo yo‘lakda odam borligi sabab bu yerda alohida ehtiyotkorlik talab qilinadi. Boshqa odamlar ham transport vositasidan tushib, yo‘lga yugurib chiqishi mumkin. To‘xtab turgan avtomobil buta bilan yashiringan yoki ogohlantirish uchburchagi qo‘yilmagan bo‘lishi mumkin. Shuning uchun ortdan kelayotgan avtomobil oldida transport vositasi to‘xtaganini juda kech sezishi mumkin. Shu sabab oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydab, ortdagi avtomobil sizning yo‘lagizga chiqishini kutishingiz kerak.

answerCTarget: [Ko‘k avtomobil] harakatni davom ettirishi mumkinligi sabab

answerCSource: I drive as far to the left as possible on my lane
